description: This file defines the LoanApplicationDraft entity class for a loan application system. It includes fields for storing application data, statuses, risk scoring, decision outcomes, timestamps, and versioning, with JPA annotations for ORM mapping. The class supports multi-step wizard states for drafts of loan applications.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a draft of a loan application, stored in the 'loan_application_draft' table, supporting multi-step wizard saves and storing JSON payloads for application data and section statuses.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the unique identifier (UUID) of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the unique identifier (UUID) of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the user ID associated with the draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the user ID associated with the draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON object mapping section keys to status metadata.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the JSON object mapping section keys to status metadata.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current application step.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current application step.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score, if available.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the computed risk score.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: getSubmittedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was submitted.

methods.name: setSubmittedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the draft was submitted.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the optimistic concurrency version number.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the optimistic concurrency version number.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was created.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the draft was last updated.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last updated timestamp.
